mapper.sql: id, username, phone, email, password, nickname, avatar, avatar_thumb, sex, user_type, role, status, wechat_id, interests, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND status = 1
SELECT FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND status = 1
SELECT FROM user WHERE wechat_id = #{wechatId} AND status = 1
